title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 459.035 - Declarant presumed to be competent
text:
459.035.  Declarant presumed to be competent. — For the purpose of sections 459.010 to 459.055, a physician or medical care facility may presume in the absence of actual notice to the contrary that an individual who executed a declaration was competent when it was executed.  The fact of an individual having executed a declaration shall not be considered as an indication of a declarant's mental incapacity.  Advanced age of itself shall not be a bar to a determination of capacity.
(L. 1985 S.B. 51 § 6)
